title: Death's Door
description:
Gain 6 [gold]Block[/gold].
If you applied [gold]Doom[/gold] this turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] 2 additional times.
upgraded_description:
Gain 7 [gold]Block[/gold].
If you applied [gold]Doom[/gold] this turn, gain [gold]Block[/gold] 2 additional times.
notes: Glows gold when Doom is applied this turn. Repeat value applies to the conditional block gains, not the initial block gain.
